sourceTid.description: the source Datom tid (required when kind='actor-event') — provenance back to the canonical event

verdict.description: G1 — kawaraban never rules a report true/false (ake/danjo boundary)

fullText.description: G4 — copyright; full body is unrepresentable (headline+link+excerpt only)

asOf.description: epoch — append-only; latest = current, the stream = the trail (非終末論)

kind.description: G11 INVARIANT — 'mirror' (real outlet, requires outlet+url) OR 'actor-event' (projected first-party Datom, requires sourceActor+sourceTid). 'original' is NOT an enum member: kawaraban is a medium, not a source

speakAs.description: G9 — never post AS an outlet or AS another actor (mirror invariant, ADR-2606042330)

personalizedFor.description: G3 — the 面 is identical for all readers; no per-reader feed

truthRating.description: G1 — no fact-check score; mirror, not adjudicator

excerpt.description: G4 — bounded fair-use quotation only; the full body is NEVER stored (see fullText below)
